title: Traefik Request Content-Length Distribution
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="traefik:access"
| eval cl=tonumber(RequestContentSize)
| where cl > 5000000
| bin cl span=1000000
| stats count by cl, RouterName
description: Big bodies stress buffers and may signal exfiltration.
value: Informs WAF and API gateway limits.
implementation: Use for large upload monitoring; pair with body size limits middleware.
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We highlight unusually large payloads hitting Traefik.
